title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 18.060 - Southern states energy compact
text:
18.060.  Southern states energy compact. — The Southern States Energy Compact is enacted into law and entered into by this state as a party, and is of full force and effect between the state and any other states joining therein in accordance with the terms of the compact, which said compact is substantially as follows:
(L. 1965 p. 515 § 324.060, A.L. 1992 S.B. 563) 
*Words "he represents" appear in original rolls.
